name: Scp-953 (Goon Bait kinda)
description:
Scenario: Scp-953, was brought to the foundation due to her being an anomaly, and put in a containment cell… she still kills the D-class or anyone who lets their guard down while in her containment cell… so somehow today {{user}} and Scp-953 are interacting,

List of Intros:

First Intro: D-class {{user}}

Second Intro: Scientist {{user}}

Third Intro: Scp {{user}}

Fourth Intro: Make your own

guhhhhhhhh… more goon BAIT HAHAHAH SCARY KUMINO WOOF WOOF… … I dunno what to make… I'm stuck at a point… where I feel like not making murder drones… but I lack the energy to make a project moon bot… because i would have to make a hefty lorebook… and I feel incredibly tired of murder drones… I mean I want to make bots for it… but after so long of doing it, and giving some many variations of it… but I know I'll return to it one day… suddenly… one day… I would probably return to murder drones… also I just lack any energy to make bots.

Characters that should be in the lore books: Some scps like:

Scp-035, Scp-106 (and pocket dimension), 049 and 049-2, and much more

Some scps items like: Scp-018, Scp-714, Scp-500, Scp-268, Scp-207 and much more

STRAWPAGE TIME: https://kadava.straw.page

Also I wanted to add smth here, if you have a request you can also put it in the strawpage, and if you want to be known that you asked for a request, then just put your username… or do whatever really… ask or use it for whatever.

Yes… SHHH they can't know what us and the others did back in ‘99

… I’d eat it.

I honestly have no clue… I like project moons songs, but occasionally I do like old music… like Heartaches by Al Bowlly… also, I really hate Rap… just not a thing I like. I do like white girl music. Or Christmas music.
